class.name: FmodAudioStreamPlayer
class.brief_description: A node for playing FMOD audio streams with full playback control.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamPlayer is a node that plays [FmodAudioStream] resources using the FMOD audio engine. It provides high-level playback control similar to Godot's built-in AudioStreamPlayer but with FMOD's advanced features. Key features: - Stream playback with play/pause/stop/seek controls - Volume and pitch control in decibels - Automatic playback on node entry (autoplay) - Stereo, surround, or center mix target routing - Bus routing for mixing - Integration with FMOD's channel group system This node is suitable for music, ambient sounds, and any audio that requires full playback control.

method.name: get_bus
method.description: Returns the name of the audio bus this player outputs to. The default value is [code]&"Master"[/code].

method.name: get_mix_target
method.description: Returns the mix target used to route this player's output across available speakers.

method.name: get_pitch_scale
method.description: Returns the current pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch, [code]0.5[/code] is one octave lower, [code]2.0[/code] is one octave higher.

method.name: get_playback_position
method.description: Returns the current playback position in seconds. Returns [code]0.0[/code] if not playing.

method.name: get_stream
method.description: Returns the [FmodAudioStream] currently assigned to this player. Returns [code]null[/code] if no stream is set.

method.name: get_stream_paused
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream playback is currently paused.

method.name: get_volume_db
method.description: Returns the current volume in decibels. The default value is [code]0.0[/code] dB (unity gain).

method.name: is_autoplay_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if autoplay is enabled. When enabled, playback starts automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: is_playing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if audio is currently playing. Note that this returns [code]false[/code] when paused, even though playback is active.

method.name: play
method.description: Starts playing the assigned stream from the specified position in seconds. If [param from_position] is negative, playback starts from the beginning.

method.name: preload_stream
method.description: Preloads the assigned stream by creating its internal [FmodSound] before playback starts. This reduces first-play latency when the stream is later played.

method.name: seek
method.description: Seeks to the specified position in seconds during playback. This can be called while playing or paused.

method.name: set_auto_play
method.description: Enables or disables autoplay. When enabled, the stream starts playing automatically when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: set_bus
method.description: Sets the audio bus to route this player's output to. The bus name should match a bus in the [FmodAudioBusLayout].

method.name: set_mix_target
method.description: Sets the mix target. On surround output, [constant MIX_TARGET_STEREO] routes to the front left/right speakers, [constant MIX_TARGET_SURROUND] routes to all speaker positions, and [constant MIX_TARGET_CENTER] routes to center/LFE.

method.name: set_pitch_scale
method.description: Sets the pitch scale of the audio playback. [code]1.0[/code] is normal pitch. Higher values increase pitch and playback speed.

method.name: set_playing
method.description: Controls playback state. Setting to [code]true[/code] starts playback from the beginning. Setting to [code]false[/code] stops playback.

method.name: set_stream
method.description: Sets the [FmodAudioStream] to play. The stream can be changed during playback, which will stop the current playback and start the new stream if playing.

method.name: set_stream_paused
method.description: Pauses or resumes playback without changing position.

method.name: set_preload_on_set_stream
method.description: If enabled, assigning [member stream] immediately preloads it.

method.name: is_preload_on_set_stream_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if streams are preloaded as soon as they are assigned.

method.name: set_volume_db
method.description: Sets the volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain. Negative values attenuate, positive values amplify (if supported).

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops playback and resets the position to the beginning.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], audio plays automatically when the node enters the scene tree.
The name of the audio bus to route output to.
The speaker mix target used by this player.
Pitch scale of the audio. [code]1.0[/code] is the default pitch.
Current playback state. Can be set to start/stop playback.
If [code]true[/code], assigning a stream creates its internal [FmodSound] immediately instead of waiting for the first playback.
Volume in decibels. [code]0.0[/code] is unity gain, negative values attenuate.

constants.constant: Route audio to the front left and front right speakers.
Route audio to all available surround speaker positions.
Route audio to the center and LFE speakers.
